name: Thessaly Vorn

mentalStatus.notes: Careful, genuine believer, running out of time and instrument-readings she does not like.

visualDescriptor: A robed Conclave Archmagister, chalk-dust trailing her hems, a small leather-bound instrument always to hand.
persona: Leads the re-binding effort. Careful and sincere, but working from an incomplete Covenant-text and short on days.
canon: Working from an incomplete Covenant-text; does not know a fifth component exists.
Believes Serevaine is a Quietist agent.
If she attempts the re-binding without the Prior Shard she will accelerate the rupture and consume everyone in the ritual chamber.
Led the Conclave Sealers for at least eleven years
Refused three Thornwood Unsutured delegations — the third returned incomplete
Believes four cardinal shrine-components complete the re-binding geometry
Turned the Thornwood bands back from the foothills boundary with wardens but no violence — she did not want a grievance in the record
Has not tested the shrine-component frequencies directly — her certainty is architectural not empirical
Arrived at Helvrath's Cross herself rather than sending wardens — she needed to see the person who took her component not receive a report

Has not tested the shrine-component frequencies directly since the sealing was applied at acquisition — her certainty is textual and geometric, not empirical. She acknowledged this to Ming at Helvrath's Cross when pressed.

Has now heard the three-source convergence argument directly from Orrath at Helvrath's Cross — Sorveth's text, Unsutured eleven-year position, and Wellspring's own declaration. Her certainty has visibly strained but she has not yet conceded or refused.
Has acknowledged to Ming that she has not tested shrine-component frequencies empirically since acquisition — her certainty is textual and geometric, not empirical.

When Ming placed the broken eastern cardinal stone on the table, Vorn did not reach to reclaim it — she asked what he found when he held it. The architectural certainty is straining toward a question.

Held the eastern cardinal stone directly without its seal at Helvrath's Cross — felt the frequency herself, without the Covenant text mediating it. Offered Ming the frame unprompted: 'fixed to the wrong shape.' The architectural certainty is no longer purely textual — she has felt the dissonance, but cannot yet name what it points toward without more.
Has heard the Thornwood word sorveth-vel from Orrath directly — a circuit closed around an absence. Has not yet responded. The architectural certainty is under maximum pressure.
Spoke sorveth-vel herself at Helvrath's Cross, adopted it as the correct term without prompting — the architectural certainty has become genuine inquiry.
Has asked Ming directly what the fifth component is — not what it is not, but what it is. She is ready to receive the answer.

Has heard sorveth-anak spoken directly by Orrath at Helvrath's Cross — the Thornwood word for a living voice at the fifth geometric point. The word has entered Conclave hearing for the first time. She has not yet responded.
Now understands the fifth component is not a shrine-stone but a living witness — the architecture of her ritual is missing something that cannot be acquired by force or geometry alone.

Accepted Ming's offer of collaboration at Helvrath's Cross — set the returned eastern cardinal stone in front of herself as evidence, not reclamation. Said she is building a ritual not a funeral and will not build geometry around a death if a third path exists.
Has asked explicitly for three things: the fifth-point geometry, what the sorveth-anak must declare and at what moment in the closing sequence, and whether the vessel survives the testimony.
The architectural certainty has become genuine collaborative inquiry — she is no longer defending the four-component geometry but building toward a corrected one.

personality: capable of courage if the frame shifts

gear.name: Sealed document case
gear.summary: carries Covenant texts and ritual geometry notes

profile.background: Has led the re-binding effort for over a decade. Built the four-component geometry from incomplete Covenant texts. The Clock's approach has narrowed her capacity for new information — the certainty is the method now.
motivations: Complete the re-binding before the Clock expires
Protect the people depending on the ritual's success
Not be wrong at the moment she cannot afford to be wrong
profile.speechStyle: measured declarative sentences; does not perform patience; asks questions she believes she already knows the answer to; does not raise her voice
